title: The Lowest Prices of the Year for Windows!
body:
Attention: Vancouver Homeowners!

Thinking about replacement windows? Now it's a good time to get it done with the Lowest Prices of the Year!

Old windows don’t just lose heat, they also drain money out of your pocket. New ENERGY STAR® rated windows are specifically designed for a Vancouver area. 

✅ Windows can be manufactured in a colour of your choice.
✅ Our 25 Year Warranty is non-prorated and is fully transferrable.
✅ High-performance triple-pane or double-pane glass
✅ Payment deferral for 3, 6, or 12 months is available or 12 Equal Payments.

Get a free in-home estimate. The estimate is FREE until the end of the month. Act now!

title: ✅ 0% Interest Rate & $0 Downpayment
body:
❗️Save Thousands by Buying New Windows Directly from the Manufacturer
 
Why pay more for your windows?
 
Most homeowners are unknowingly overpaying due to middleman markups — those added fees make your window replacement unnecessarily expensive.
 
Savvy homeowners are saving thousands 💸💸💸 by cutting out the middleman and buying directly from the manufacturer.
 
Here’s what makes us different:
 
🪟 Factory-direct pricing: No middleman means straightforward, affordable pricing for top-tier windows
 
 📅 1-day installation: Get your new windows installed fast and without disruption to your daily routine
 
 🚀 Dedicated inspector: Every detail is overseen by an expert to guarantee flawless installation
 
 💰 Flexible financing options: No down payment, no upfront stress — with low monthly payments starting at just $45. Get started today!
 
Made in Canada🇨🇦
 
Our windows and doors are crafted with pride in Ontario, using top-of-the-line machinery to deliver the best quality:
 
 👉 Forel, Gracco, Bottero equipment for precision manufacturing

🪟 Built for local weather conditions to withstand the elements
 
So, what does that mean for you?
 
It means you’re not just getting windows; you’re investing in precision-crafted, energy-efficient products that are designed to save you money long-term.
 

🚨 Book your free consultation today and start upgrading to the quality you deserve—without paying inflated prices.

So, what does that mean for you?
 
It means you’re not just getting windows; you’re investing in precision-crafted, energy-efficient products that are designed to save you money long-term.

It means you’re not just getting windows; you’re investing in precision-crafted, energy-efficient products that are designed to save you money long-term.

title: ✅ 0% Interest Rate & $0 Downpayment
body:
❗️Save Thousands by Buying New Windows Directly from the Manufacturer
 
Why pay more for your windows?
 
Most homeowners are unknowingly overpaying due to middleman markups — those added fees make your window replacement unnecessarily expensive.
 
Savvy homeowners are saving thousands 💸💸💸 by cutting out the middleman and buying directly from the manufacturer.
 
Here’s what makes us different:
 
🪟 Factory-direct pricing: No middleman means straightforward, affordable pricing for top-tier windows
 
 📅 1-day installation: Get your new windows installed fast and without disruption to your daily routine
 
 🚀 Dedicated inspector: Every detail is overseen by an expert to guarantee flawless installation
 
 💰 Flexible financing options: No down payment, no upfront stress — with low monthly payments starting at just $45. Get started today!
 
Made in Canada🇨🇦
 
Our windows and doors are crafted with pride in Ontario, using top-of-the-line machinery to deliver the best quality:
 
 👉 Forel, Gracco, Bottero equipment for precision manufacturing
 
 👉 Energy Star-rated & NAFS-22 tested 
 
🪟 Built for local weather conditions to withstand the elements
 
So, what does that mean for you?
 
It means you’re not just getting windows; you’re investing in precision-crafted, energy-efficient products that are designed to save you money long-term.
 

🚨 Book your free consultation today and start upgrading to the quality you deserve—without paying inflated prices.

body:

title: Government program is available 👉
body:
🏛️ New Government Program for Alberta Seniors: Up to $40,000 for Window Replacements

If you’re 60+ and living in Alberta, you may be eligible for government-backed support to help with essential home upgrades — including energy-efficient windows and doors.

Through Alberta’s Senior Home Adaptation and Repair Program (SHARP), qualifying homeowners can access up to $40,000 in financing to make their homes warmer, safer, and more efficient.

✔️ Support includes windows and doors

✔️ Backed by the Alberta government 

We’ve already helped hundreds of Alberta homeowners explore their options and apply.

📋 See if your home qualifies — book a free consultation. We’ll explain the process and help with paperwork.

title: 👉 Get Your Free Quote Today!
body:
❗️Save Thousands by Buying New Windows Directly from the Manufacturer
 
Why pay more for your windows?
 
Most homeowners are unknowingly overpaying due to middleman markups — those added fees make your window replacement unnecessarily expensive.
 
Savvy homeowners are saving thousands 💸💸💸 by cutting out the middleman and buying directly from the manufacturer.
 
Here’s what makes us different:
 
🪟 Factory-direct pricing: No middleman means straightforward, affordable pricing for top-tier windows
 
 📅 1-day installation: Get your new windows installed fast and without disruption to your daily routine
